title: Midjourney V8: Did They Cook, or Are They Cooked?

segments.text: Well, MidJourney version 8 has arrived
and well, I mean, there have been some
mixed reactions. Honestly, it wouldn't
be a MidJourney version update if there
weren't. So, today we're going to dive
into the new model and well, burn all my
fast hours to give it a fair shake to
see what it can do, what it can't do,
and of course, answer the question, did
MidJourney cook, or are they cooked?
Well, let's go dash dash and find out.
So, it has been a minute since the last
MidJourney version update. Actually,
version 7 dropped in April of 2025. And
I mean, to be honest, reactions to that
update were shaky as well. To be honest,
this has always kind of been par for the
course. Well, since my beloved

well, the what of version 8 alpha in
